flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Glendale Community College rose 45% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.5k → $10.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Glendale Community College fell 35% between 2007 and 2010 (75.4% → 49.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Glendale Community College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Glendale Community College rose 27% between 2007 and 2010 ($545 → $691).
